summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PropGram property social media platform. All critical feed filtering functionality working perfectly - Move tab shows only rentals, Buy/Sell shows only sales. Authentication, UI navigation, and core features fully functional.

minor_bugs.issue: Property creation returns 500 Internal Server Error
minor_bugs.impact: Cannot create new properties via API, but existing properties work fine

minor_bugs.issue: Area creation fails with 'Area already exists' error
minor_bugs.impact: Cannot create duplicate areas, but existing areas work

auth_issues.issue: Brute force protection threshold not exactly at 5 attempts
auth_issues.impact: Security feature partially working but not precise

passed_tests: All 4 tabs work: Following, For You, Move, Buy/Sell
Move tab filters to show only rental properties
Buy/Sell tab filters to show only sale properties
User registration with Explorer/Vendor/Agent role selection
User login works with seeded credentials (admin@propgram.com / admin123)
Search page loads with area search functionality
Property information display with proper details
